title: AN ACT DECLARING APRIL 5 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDING ANNIVERSARY, TO BE KNOWN AS THE "PANGASINAN DAY"

chunks.text:
115 OG No. 39, 10808 (September 30, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11374, August 22, 2019 ]

AN ACT DECLARING APRIL 5 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDING ANNIVERSARY, TO BE KNOWN AS THE "PANGASINAN DAY"

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION

1. April 5 of every year is hereby declared a special working holiday in the province of Pangasinan in commemoration of its founding anniversary, to be known as the "Pangasinan Day". Upon proclamation of the President, April 5 of every year shall be a special nonworking holiday in the Province of Pangasinan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

T

his Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives on May 22, 2017, amended by the Senate of the Philippines on June 3, 2019, and which amendments were concurred in by the House of Representatives on June 4, 2019.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: AUG 22 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
